resources.string: This service allows Jobin to open the system power menu from Quick Settings. It does not read your screen or collect any data.
Jobin requires Accessibility permission to open the Power Menu from Quick Settings. Without this, the Power Menu tile will not work.
Accessibility permission is granted! You can now use the Power Menu tile from Quick Settings.
You can hide the Jobin app icon from your launcher to keep it clean. The Quick Settings tiles will remain available.
